text: Who will be driving the buses next week?
Busmen have decided to go on strike next week.
zh: 公交车司机们已决定下周举行罢工。

text: The strike is due to begin on Tuesday.
No one knows how long it will last.
zh: 没人知道罢工会持续多久。

text: The busmen have stated that the strike will continue until general agreement is reached about pay and working conditions.
zh: 公交车司机们表示,罢工将持续到就工资和工作条件达成一致意见为止。

text: Most people believe that the strike will last for at least a week.
zh: 大多数人认为罢工至少会持续一周。

text: Many owners of private cars are going to offer 'free rides' to people on their way to work.
zh: 许多私家车车主打算为上班途中的人们提供'免费搭车'服务。

text: This will relieve pressure on the trains to some extent.
zh: 这在一定程度上会减轻火车的运输压力。

text: Meanwhile, a number of university students have volunteered to drive buses while the strike lasts.
zh: 与此同时,一些大学生自愿在罢工期间开公交车。

text: All the students are expert drivers,
zh: 这些学生都是驾驶高手,

text: but before they drive any of the buses, they will have to pass a special test.
zh: 但在开车之前,他们必须通过一项特别测试。

text: The students are going to take the test in two days' time.
zh: 学生们将在两天后参加这项测试。

text: Even so, people are going to find it difficult to get to work.
zh: 即便如此,人们上班还是会觉得不方便。

text: But so far, the public has expressed its gratitude to the students in lettters to the Press.
zh: 但到目前为止,公众已通过写信给媒体表达了对这些学生的感激之情。

text: Only one or two people have objected that the students will drive too fast!
zh: 只有一两个人反对,认为学生们开车会开得太快!
